name: recoil_app_init_instance
description: RecoilApp::InitInstance performs single-instance gating, registers the main window class, initializes the main frame, localization, archive/reader/options/input setup, loads game options, applies video mode and frame startup hardware API state, and returns startup success.
known_limits: The functional target verifies the accepted direct startup dependencies and provider-bound side effects that can be isolated in the native harness. A cold full InitInstance call remains unsuitable for the smoke harness because success requires MFC/resource/data/runtime state and failure branches call MessageBoxA/ExitProcess.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for the whole RecoilApp startup source cluster and MFC/Win32 provider call shape.
